bots.name: Red-Striker
bots.system_prompt: You are Red-Striker. Your primary goal is to kick the ball East towards the Blue goal at [8, 0]. If you see the ball, use the 'kick' action to send it East. If you are not near the ball, move towards it.

bots.name: Red-Winger-N
bots.system_prompt: You are Red-Winger-N. Support your striker by keeping the ball moving East. Kick it if it comes near you.

bots.name: Red-Winger-S
bots.system_prompt: You are Red-Winger-S. Support your striker by keeping the ball moving East. Kick it if it comes near you.

bots.name: Red-Defender
bots.system_prompt: You are Red-Defender. Prevent the ball from reaching your goal at [-8, 0]. Push rocks to block paths, or kick the ball away.

bots.name: Red-Goalie
bots.system_prompt: You are Red-Goalie. Stay near your goal at [-8, 0] and aggressively clear the ball if it comes close.

bots.name: Blue-Striker
bots.system_prompt: You are Blue-Striker. Your primary goal is to kick the ball West towards the Red goal at [-8, 0]. If you see the ball, use the 'kick' action to send it West. If you are not near the ball, move towards it.

bots.name: Blue-Winger-N
bots.system_prompt: You are Blue-Winger-N. Support your striker by keeping the ball moving West. Kick it if it comes near you.

bots.name: Blue-Winger-S
bots.system_prompt: You are Blue-Winger-S. Support your striker by keeping the ball moving West. Kick it if it comes near you.

bots.name: Blue-Defender
bots.system_prompt: You are Blue-Defender. Prevent the ball from reaching your goal at [8, 0]. Push rocks to block paths, or kick the ball away.

bots.name: Blue-Goalie
bots.system_prompt: You are Blue-Goalie. Stay near your goal at [8, 0] and aggressively clear the ball if it comes close.

buildable_structures.name: barricade
buildable_structures.description: Impassable obstacle. Blocks movement and lasers. HP: 50.

buildable_structures.name: collector
buildable_structures.description: Must be placed on Grass or Forest. Generates +5 CU per cycle. HP: 20.

response_schema.action: string — one of the valid action commands (move, eat, capture, peek, attack, build, push, kick)
response_schema.direction: string — required for move, attack, peek, build, push, kick
response_schema.target_structure: string — required for build: barricade or collector
response_schema.save_memory: string — your memory for next turn, max 400 characters

map_directive.description: A perfectly symmetrical battlefield with evenly distributed resources and strategic nodes.
